title: port_dispatch: PayloadTooShort maps to UnknownPort(0)
description:
File: rust/lichen-node/src/port_dispatch.rs
Line: 90

The From<DispatchError> for UdpDispatchError maps PayloadTooShort to UnknownPort(0) with a comment 'shouldn't happen'. This loses error information and creates a misleading error message. Port 0 is a valid port number (though reserved), so this could confuse debugging.

Better: Add a PayloadTooShort variant to UdpDispatchError, or use a different sentinel value like UnknownPort(u16::MAX).
close_reason: Fixed: added PayloadTooShort variant to UdpDispatchError to preserve error information
